# Scripts Reference

## artifacts.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/artifacts.py
- **Description:** Artifact CRUD with full validation pipeline: domain type check, required property validation, JSONL event write, then Neo4j write.
- **Inputs:** project_dir, neo4j Driver, database name, DomainConfig, artifact_type, properties dict, actor, authority
- **Outputs:** artifact_id (UUID string) on create; no return on update/transition/link
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.core.artifacts import create_artifact, update_artifact, transition_state, create_link
- **Dependencies:** seldon.core.graph, seldon.core.events, seldon.core.state, seldon.domain.loader
- **State:** proposed

## build.py

- **Path:** seldon/paper/build.py
- **Description:** Paper build pipeline: discovers section .md files, resolves graph reference tokens (result/figure/cite), runs Tier 1 structural checks (SI-01 missing, SI-02 stale, SI-03 proposed, SI-07 missing bibtex, SI-08 missing figure), runs Tier 2/3 QC, assembles .qmd, optionally renders via Quarto.
- **Inputs:** project_dir, paper_dir (paper/), output_path, skip_qc, strict, no_render flags, optional config overrides
- **Outputs:** resolved .qmd file; exit code 0/1; printed summary of all findings
- **Parameters:** --skip-qc, --strict, --output PATH, --no-render, --qc-config, --style-config
- **Usage:** seldon paper build [--skip-qc] [--strict] [--no-render]
- **Dependencies:** seldon.config, seldon.paper.qc, neo4j, subprocess (quarto)
- **State:** proposed

## cli.py

- **Path:** seldon/cli.py
- **Description:** CLI entry point. Defines the main Click group and registers all command subgroups (artifact, link, result, task, briefing, closeout, paper, docs).
- **Inputs:** command-line arguments via Click
- **Outputs:** CLI command dispatch; no return value
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** seldon <command> [options] — installed as console_script entry point
- **Dependencies:** click, all seldon.commands.* modules
- **State:** proposed

## config.py

- **Path:** seldon/config.py
- **Description:** Project config management: loads seldon.yaml and .env, creates Neo4j driver, manages session lifecycle (start/end/get current session).
- **Inputs:** project_dir (optional Path), seldon.yaml + .env in project root, NEO4J_USERNAME/NEO4J_PASSWORD env vars
- **Outputs:** project config dict, neo4j Driver, session_id (UUID string)
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.config import load_project_config, get_neo4j_driver, start_session, end_session
- **Dependencies:** yaml, json, pathlib, python-dotenv, neo4j
- **State:** proposed

## events.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/events.py
- **Description:** Append-only JSONL event store. Source of truth for all state changes in a Seldon project.
- **Inputs:** project_path (Path), event dict with event_id/type/actor/authority/payload
- **Outputs:** appended line to seldon_events.jsonl; returns event list on read
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.core.events import append_event, read_events, make_event
- **Dependencies:** json, pathlib, uuid, logging
- **State:** proposed

## graph.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/graph.py
- **Description:** Neo4j graph operations: CRUD for artifact nodes, relationships, provenance traversal, and stats queries.
- **Inputs:** neo4j.Session, artifact_id/type/properties/rel_type
- **Outputs:** artifact dicts, relationship counts, provenance chains
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.core.graph import create_artifact, get_artifact, get_provenance_chain, graph_stats
- **Dependencies:** neo4j, re, datetime
- **State:** proposed

## loader.py

- **Path:** seldon/domain/loader.py
- **Description:** Domain configuration parser. Loads research.yaml and validates it into Pydantic models (DomainConfig, ArtifactTypeConfig, PropertyDef, RelationshipConfig). Provides type/relationship/property validation helpers.
- **Inputs:** config_path (Path to domain YAML file)
- **Outputs:** DomainConfig Pydantic model with artifact_types, relationship_types, state_machines, and property helpers
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.domain.loader import load_domain_config, validate_artifact_type, validate_relationship
- **Dependencies:** pydantic, yaml, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## qc.py

- **Path:** seldon/paper/qc.py
- **Description:** Paper prose quality checks (Tier 2: sentence length, paragraph length, bold, em-dashes, semicolons, hedge stacking, ambiguous pronouns) and style checks (Tier 3: banned words/phrases, repetition, clichés, self-congratulation, nominalizations).
- **Inputs:** markdown text (str), QC config dict (from paper_qc_config.yaml), style config dict (from paper_style_config.yaml)
- **Outputs:** list of Violation dataclasses with check_id, file, line, message, text
- **Parameters:** --tier 2|3 to run subset; configs loaded from paper/ or template defaults
- **Usage:** from seldon.paper.qc import run_tier2, run_tier3, load_qc_config, format_violations
- **Dependencies:** re, yaml, pathlib, dataclasses
- **State:** proposed

## staleness.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/staleness.py
- **Description:** Staleness propagation: when a Result goes stale, cascades to all downstream artifacts that CITES it via the graph.
- **Inputs:** neo4j Driver, database, project_dir, DomainConfig, artifact_id of stale artifact
- **Outputs:** list of affected artifact_ids; transitions each downstream to stale in Neo4j + JSONL
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** Called automatically by artifacts.transition_state when new_state == stale
- **Dependencies:** seldon.core.artifacts, seldon.core.state, neo4j
- **State:** proposed

## state.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/state.py
- **Description:** State machine validation. Checks that a proposed state transition is permitted by the domain config before any write occurs.
- **Inputs:** DomainConfig, artifact_type, current_state, new_state
- **Outputs:** None on success; raises InvalidStateTransition or ValueError on failure
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.core.state import validate_transition, InvalidStateTransition
- **Dependencies:** seldon.domain.loader
- **State:** proposed

## sync.py

- **Path:** seldon/core/sync.py
- **Description:** JSONL-to-Neo4j sync engine. Replays events from the append-only log into the Neo4j projection. Supports full replay (destructive) and incremental sync (from sync point).
- **Inputs:** project_path (Path), neo4j Driver, database name
- **Outputs:** number of events applied; updates Neo4j nodes/relationships and _SeldonMeta sync point
- **Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly
- **Usage:** from seldon.core.sync import full_replay, incremental_sync
- **Dependencies:** seldon.core.events, seldon.core.graph, neo4j, logging
- **State:** proposed
